content.text:
engine: pdo_sqlite
tables:
  "\"users\"":
    columns:
      id:
        type: Integer
        nullable: false
        default: null
        auto_increment: false
      name:
        type: Text
        nullable: false
        default: null
        auto_increment: false
      email:
        type: Text
        nullable: false
        default: null
        auto_increment: false
      age:
        type: Integer
        nullable: true
        default: null
        auto_increment: false
    indexes:
      primary:
        columns[1]: "\"id\""
        is_unique: true
        is_primary: true
    foreign_keys[0]:
    triggers[1]{name,statement}:
      trg_users_insert,"CREATE TRIGGER trg_users_insert\n            AFTER INSERT ON users\n            BEGIN\n                SELECT 1;\n            END"
    check_constraints[0]:
views:
  "\"active_users\"":
    sql: "CREATE VIEW active_users AS\n            SELECT id, name, email FROM users WHERE name != ''"
routines:
  stored_procedures[0]:
  functions[0]:
  sequences[0]:
